'''Lol''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] native of [[Solem]], living during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was part of a resistance movement against the planetary [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]].

{{Char-stub}}
